stemHtml: During circling, visual contact with the runway is lost on the downwind leg. What should you do?

options.a: Turn towards the runway, maintain altitude, request ATC instructions.
options.b: Make an initial climbing turn towards the runway and initiate the missed approach.
options.c: Continue visually if other aerodrome cues remain.
options.d: Turn 90° towards the runway and try to regain visual.
